narrative:
Cols 72-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 772 registered voters, with 49.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.9 percentage points.
